es.result_context: The volumen ({volumen}) is the capacity of the cylinder; area_lateral ({area_lateral}) is the curved surface area excluding top and bottom bases.

steps.description: Calculate volume: ГЏГўвЂљВ¬ Г— 6.25 Г— 12.8 = 251.3274 uВі
Calculate lateral area: 2 Г— ГЏГўвЂљВ¬ Г— 2.5 Г— 12.8 = 201.0619 uВІ
Results: 251.33 cubic units volume, 201.06 square units lateral area

mistakes: Using diameter instead of radius in formulas
Forgetting to square the radius in volume calculation
Confusing lateral area with total surface area (which includes bases)
